# User Story 3: Manage My Passkeys

As an Admin, I want to view my active passkeys, rename them, and delete/revoke keys I no longer use.

## Parent Feature
- Part of Feature: Passkey-Based Authentication

## Acceptance Criteria
1. The settings panel lists registered keys with labels and dates.
2. The Admin can edit key labels and delete credentials.
3. Revoking the last key requires confirmation if no other authentication recovery mechanism is configured.

## Gherkin BDD Scenario
*(Covered under standard mock assertions in credential CRUD flows)*
